html:
Your Personalized Recovery Plan

Lisa’s shedding has been unpredictable—calming, then suddenly flaring again. That wave pattern shows her follicles are still sensitive while ongoing stress and hormonal shifts keep the system on edge. This protocol steadies that cycle by anchoring her sleep rhythm and rebuilding her calm, while gently restoring nutrition from the roots up. She’s now entering the stabilization phase, aiming to turn those early baby hairs into stronger, lasting growth. With each week’s practice, control returns and the rollercoaster loses power. 🌱

Stay steady now—this is where balance becomes visible progress.
